title: 2 x Ceramic Wax Melt Essential Oil Burner, Star Pattern, White, 9.8 x 9.8 x 11.5 cm
features: Decorative Design: This ceramic aroma burner features a white finish with a star pattern cut-out design, creating a warm, ambient glow when lit.
Versatile Use: Suitable for melting wax tarts or using with essential oils to release soothing fragrances into the air.
Generous Size: Measuring 9.8 x 9.8 x 11.5 centimetres, this large burner offers ample space for wax melts or essential oils.
Convenient: The burner's design allows for easy placement and use in bedrooms, living areas, or any room where you desire a pleasant aroma.
Stylish Accent: With its elegant appearance, this burner can complement various home decor styles while providing a relaxing ambience.
description: Product description Experience the warm ambiance of this ceramic aroma burner, perfect for creating a soothing atmosphere in your home or bedroom. With its elegant star pattern design, this essential oil burner adds a touch of sophistication to any space. Measuring 9.8 x 9.8 x 11.5 centimetres, it is generously sized to provide long-lasting fragrance diffusion. Simply place a tealight candle inside and add a few drops of your favourite essential oils to the wax melt pool to enjoy the therapeutic benefits of aromatherapy. This ceramic burner is an excellent choice for those seeking a stylish and functional way to enhance their living environment with natural scents. Directions Place a tealight candle inside the burner. Add a few drops of essential oil to the wax melt pool. Light the candle to enjoy the fragrance. Safety Warning Always use essential oils with caution. Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Do not ingest essential oils. See more
